title: Hold That Slime
description: Allows you to bucket up slime or honey blocks and move them to another location.
body:
# Hold That Slime

**Hold That Slime** is a simple quality of life mod that allows you to bucket up **honey** or **slime** blocks and replace them elsewhere. 

# Installation

Install the latest version of fabric for this mod to work, then, drag the .jar file inside of your mods folder and you're good to go!

# Dependencies

### [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
